product.title: LUMINESS Liquid Mirage w/SPF 50 Color Adjusting Foundation Kit - Color Changing Foundation, SPF 50 Primer & Makeup Brush, Face Makeup for Mature Skin, 4in1 Liquid Foundation, Concealer & Moisturizer
featureBullets: Liquid Foundation Trio Complexion Kit: Features LUMINESS Liquid Mirage color-changing foundation with encapsulated pigments that adapt to your skin tone, an SPF 50 primer for sun protection and a luminous base, and a professional angled buffing brush for smooth, airbrushed blending and a radiant, flawless finish.

One Shade, Perfect Match: Discover the magic of our ultra-smart, tone-adapting micro-beads. This revolutionary liquid foundation transforms as you blend, seamlessly adjusting to your unique skin tone in minutes. The result? A flawless, natural finish - effortless, stress-free, and truly yours.

Adaptive Color Changing Foundation: Our innovative self-adjusting liquid foundation seamlessly adapts to your unique skin tone for a radiant, skin-like finish. This lightweight formula provides light to medium buildable coverage while doubling as a concealer and moisturizer for hydrated, radiant skin - perfect for all skin tones.

Skincare-Enhanced Beauty: Hydrate, smooth, protect, and perfect in one effortless step. Infused with Hyaluronic Acid and Vitamin E, this clean, hypoallergenic, fragrance-free formula boosts your natural glow - build it up or sheer it out, your radiant skin, your way.

Makeup Primer & Broad Spectrum Sunscreen SPF 50 with Skin-Loving Ingredients: Enriched with Shea Butter and Vitamin E, this lightweight primer combines skin care and beauty, shielding and nourishing your skin - perfect under make up for a smooth, healthy-looking all-day finish.

How to Use: Apply our SPF 50 primer first, spreading evenly over clean skin 15 minutes before sun exposure. Shake and dispense 2–3 drops of the color-changing foundation, then blend with the makeup brush or your fingers as it transforms to your perfect shade in 10–15 minutes. Reapply SPF every 2 hours or after swimming/sweating, and touch up foundation as needed.

specification.value: Dual Sided Angled Buffing Brush L400, Liquid Mirage Color Adjusting Foundation, SPF 50 Prime & Protect
#3,202 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #39 in Foundation Makeup
Adaptive Color, Buildable Coverage, Hydrating Formula, Skin-Like Finish, Skincare-Infused

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation provides all-day coverage and matches their skin tone perfectly, with the shade-adjusting formula working effectively. The product is lightweight, silky, and easy to apply, creating a natural look. They appreciate its high quality and effectiveness, with one customer noting it's better than expensive brands.

reviews.reviewTitle: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Beautiful natural finish and so easy to use
reviews.reviewText: I’ve been really happy with the Luminess Liquid Mirage Color Adjusting Foundation Kit. The formula blends easily and adjusts nicely to my skin tone, giving a smooth, natural finish without feeling heavy or cakey. It provides just the right amount of coverage to even out my complexion while still looking very natural. I also love that it includes SPF 50, which makes it perfect for everyday use. The brush in the kit is great quality and makes application quick and easy. Overall, a fantastic lightweight foundation that leaves my skin looking fresh and radiant.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Shipping was delayed, but once I received the product, I’ve been using it for a week now. I purchased Light since I typically fall between Light and Medium and also use bronzer to add depth. I love that the kit comes with sunscreen, a brush, and the foundation. The foundation was a little deeper than expected when I swatched it on the back of my hand, but it was surprisingly a good match for my face. This has a mousse-like texture that can be built up for more coverage. It feels like a tinted moisturizer, and the best part is that it adjusts to your skin tone. With proper skin prep, it wore well when I set it with translucent powder (used my own). The product was not cakey and did not cling to dry patches. It does have a light smell that dissipates within a minute — it wasn’t bothersome to me, even as someone sensitive to scents who can get headaches. I used 4 drops and had a decent amount of coverage for my entire face. I also applied liquid blush and contour stick on top, and it did not make my makeup slip. I have combo skin and only had to blot my T-zone midday. So far I have not had any reactions or any breakouts so I will continue to use this daily. Overall, I’m very happy with the entire kit and think it’s very innovative and super easy to choose your color.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 14, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I’ve tried a lot of foundations to help with uneven tone, and this one has worked better than most. It covers well but doesn’t feel heavy, which I really like. The finish looks natural and smooth on my skin, and it blends in nicely with my shade. I also like the packaging and that it comes with tools that actually make it easier to apply. My skin looks more even and a bit more hydrated, and I’ve gotten a couple compliments on how fresh it looks!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 5, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Love the product. Very sheer with decent coverage. The application method is terrible.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Too small a bottle for the price
reviews.reviewText: Love the product great coverage changes to match your face just like it says it does. It just comes in too small of a bottle once again it is a great product but needs to be in bigger size. The small size does not last very long for that price.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 25, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I LOVE this foundation! I've been using Luminess lip and eye products for years - this was my first time using the foundation. Love that this kit comes with a SPF 50 primer (I use SPF daily) and an easy-to-use applicator brush. The brush helps spread the foundation evenly and lightly (I don't like a "heavy" makeup look). I like the mousse-y texture of the foundation, and that it feels more like a tinted moisturizer vs a heavier foundation. It comes out white as first but then adjusts to your skin tone. I purchased both the Light and Medium, as my skin is very fair in the winter and I tan easily in the summer. The Light is a great match for where my skin tone is right now (month of January). Overall I'm super happy with this product and will buy again!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 22, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Kept seeing ads for this and finally decided to try it. It is fabulous, coverage is great and it covers all my dark spots (I am 75 after all) in a flash and feels wonderful on my skin. It lasts on my face for a long time.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 26, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This Luminess Liquid blends in perfectly with my skin color. It covers brown spots and blemishes well and feels light on the skin. When I put it on, there is no heaviness or "clogged pore" feeling. I live in a hot humid area of the country and the Luminess stays put all day with no change in color or coverage. The only reason that I gave the Luminess a 3 star rating was the fact that the bottle was only half full of liquid makeup when I received it. The bottle was sealed, so I know that it came from the manufacturer that way. I really like the makeup and would buy it again if I could get a full bottle of product. The price is reasonable for a full bottle of product.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 16, 2026
